description_long: This is a modern, two-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The front features large, black-framed windows arranged symmetrically, and a central recessed entryway beneath a black overhang. The building is set on a paved lot with parking spaces, currently occupied by two blue pickup trucks and two beige sedans. The upper floor has open rooftop sections, possibly for HVAC units or rooftop access, and the exterior walls are finished in white. The rear and side elevations are plain, with minimal window openings and no decorative elements.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large black-framed windows, and a central entryway, set on a paved lot with parking spaces and vehicles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, large windows, central entryway, black overhang, and four parked vehicles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the building, the parking lot, and the open rooftop sections; minimal side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with a few windows and no decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the parking lot, rooftop sections, and minimal side windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Central recessed entryway with a black overhang, no steps, and a minimalist design.
